SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENCHANT.title: Enchantments
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_BASE_COST.title: Base Cost
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_BASE_COST.hover.d: The vanilla price is 75 + 25*n. Set this to 75 for the vanilla experience.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_STEP_COST.title: Cost Increase
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REFRESH_COST.title: Refresh Cost
SHOPENHANCEMENT-RELIC_REFRESH_MODE.title: Shop Relic Refresh Mode
SHOPENHANCEMENT-RELIC_REFRESH_MODE.hover:
Vanilla: Relics never reappear once shown, even if they were not purchased. After enough refreshes, only Circlets may remain (after roughly 40 refreshes).
Rotation Queue: Prioritizes relics you have not seen. Once all relics have been shown, unacquired relics return to the refresh pool and may appear again.
Fully Random: Randomly selects from all eligible, unpurchased relics.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENABLE_SKIP_CARD_REWARD_: Enable Gold for Skipping Card Rewards
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENABLE_SELL_MODE.title: Enable Sell Mode
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENABLE_SELL_MODE.hover.d: Click Sell Mode in the bottom-left corner of the shop screen, then right-click a relic or potion to sell it. The settings below are not shop purchase prices; they control how much Gold you receive when selling items to the shop.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_PRICE_VARIANCE.hove: Relic and potion sell prices vary randomly within the configured range, calculated independently for each item. A setting of 0.2 allows prices to vary by up to ±20%.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-RELIC_SELL_RULE_PRESET.h:
These checks use the relic flags provided by the game. A relic is blocked if it matches any disallowed condition. Not every relic has been tested, so the results may not always match the settings.
Strict Mode: Uses the vanilla relic tradability flag. Actual behavior is determined by that flag; the rules below are only an equivalent reference.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_ANCIENT_RELICS.hov: Relics of the Ancients found in each act, such as Golden Compass.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_EVENT_RELICS.title: Allow Event Relics
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_EVENT_RELICS.hover: Examples: Big Mushroom and Blessed Cheese.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_WAX_RELICS.title: Allow Wax Relics
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_WAX_RELICS.hover.d: The general rule for Wax relics, whether or not they have melted.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_MELTED_RELICS.hove: Melted Wax relics are configured separately.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_USED_UP_RELICS.hov:
Example: Lizard Tail restores 50% of your HP upon death.
After it triggers, the game marks its uses as exhausted.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_UPON_PICKUP_RELICS:
Example: Strawberry increases Max HP when obtained.
When disabled, relics whose on-pickup effects have already triggered cannot be sold.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ALLOW_DISABLED_RELICS.ho: Uses the game's disabled-relic flag. For example, Pumpkin Candle is marked as disabled after five combats and is re-enabled after adding fuel at a Rest Site.
For reference: The game's internal price for Common relics is 175. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_UNCOMMON_RELIC_PRIC: For reference: The game's internal price for Uncommon relics is 225. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_RARE_RELIC_PRICE.ho: For reference: The game's internal price for Rare relics is 275. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_SHOP_RELIC_PRICE.ho: For reference: The game's internal price for Shop relics is 200. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_ANCIENT_RELIC_PRICE: The game does not assign a price to Ancient relics. For rarity and balance, the default sell value is calculated as 40% of 600.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_STARTER_RELIC_PRICE: The game does not assign a price to Starter relics. For rarity and balance, the default sell value is calculated as 40% of 600.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_EVENT_RELIC_PRICE.h: The game does not assign a price to Event relics. For rarity and balance, the default sell value is calculated as 40% of 200.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_COMMON_POTION_PRICE: For reference: The game's internal price for Common potions is 50. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_UNCOMMON_POTION_PRI: For reference: The game's internal price for Uncommon potions is 75. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_RARE_POTION_PRICE.h: For reference: The game's internal price for Rare potions is 100. The default sell value is approximately 40% of that.
